summary: Frontend-only testing of Advanced (Gelismis) module consolidation from 8 to 4 items. All 14 test cases passed. The 4 consolidated pages (Gelir Yonetimi, AI & Zeka, Messaging Center, Analitik & Raporlar) load correctly with proper tab structure. Legacy routes remain accessible. No double Layout wrapping detected.

issues: Pre-existing 'clone' error: 'Failed to execute clone on Response: Response body is already used' - This is NOT caused by the consolidation (exists on standalone /data-intelligence route too)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Gelismis dropdown shows 'Messaging Center' instead of 'Mesajlasma' as specified in navItems.jsx - may be intentional for English UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced module consolidation is complete and working. The 4 consolidated pages are: (1) Gelir Yonetimi at /app/gelir-yonetimi with 3 tabs (Fiyat Stratejisi/RMS, Gelir Motoru/Revenue Engine, Autopilot), (2) AI & Zeka at /app/ai-zeka with 2 tabs (AI Hub, Veri Zekasi/Data Intelligence), (3) Messaging Center at /messaging-dashboard (standalone), (4) Analitik & Raporlar at /app/analitik with 2 tabs (Rapor Disa Aktarma/Analytics Export, ML Zamanlayici/ML Scheduler). All legacy routes still work.

gelir_yonetimi_page.fiyat_stratejisi_tab: PASS - RMS content with demand forecast chart, comp-set analysis, auto-pricing toggle
gelir_yonetimi_page.gelir_motoru_tab: PASS - Revenue Engine content with ADR/RevPAR KPIs, trend charts, rate suggestions
gelir_yonetimi_page.autopilot_tab: PASS - Revenue Autopilot content with approval queue, policy summary

ai_zeka_page.ai_hub_tab: PASS - AI Module content with briefing card, AI stats, chatbot
ai_zeka_page.veri_zekasi_tab: PASS - Data Intelligence content (has pre-existing clone error)

analitik_raporlar_page.rapor_export_tab: PASS - Analytics Export content with report cards, CSV/JSON buttons
analitik_raporlar_page.ml_scheduler_tab: PASS - ML Scheduler content with model schedules
